description.LOCATION_CN: 機場快綫，機場快綫，東涌綫及東涌綫服務延誤

2024-09-03T09:38:00.CONTENT_EN:
Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that extra travelling time can be expected on the Airport Express & Tung Chung Line. 
Please allow more time for travel.
2024-09-03T09:38:00.CONTENT_CN:
運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，機場快綫及東涌綫列車預計需要額外行車時間，
請為行程預留充裕時間。

2024-09-03T09:52:00.CONTENT_EN:
Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that due to a signalling equipment fault between Sunny Bay Station and Tsing Yi Station, Airport Express & Tung Chung Line trains will operate at a slower speed from Sunny Bay Station to Tsing Yi Station. This could extend the total journey time on the Airport Express & Tung Chung Line between Hong Kong Station and Tung Chung / AsiaWorld-Expo Station by 10-15 minutes.   In-town Check-in service close out time is extended from 90 minutes to 120 minutes.   Longer waiting times on Airport Express & Tung Chung Line platforms can be expected. 

Please allow more time for travel.
2024-09-03T09:52:00.CONTENT_CN:
運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，由於欣澳站和青衣站之間有信號設備故障，機場快綫及東涌綫列車駛經欣澳站至青衣站路段時需要慢駛，機場快綫及東涌綫來往香港站及東涌/博覽館站的行車時間預計需要額外10-15分鐘。  市區預辦登機服務的截止時間，將由飛機起飛前的90分鐘改為飛機起飛前的120分鐘。  現時機場快綫及東涌綫月台上的乘客較多，候車時間亦會較長。

請為行程預留充裕時間。

2024-09-03T10:28:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that the signalling equipment fault between Sunny Bay Station and Tsing Yi Station on the Airport Express & Tung Chung Line has been repaired. Train operations can now be safely resumed. Normal train service is gradually resuming.
2024-09-03T10:28:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，欣澳站和青衣站之間的信號設備故障已完成復修。機場快綫及東涌綫列車服務逐步回復正常。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 2024年09月06日及07日個別列車始發/終到站更改

2024-09-05T18:40:00.CONTENT_EN: Gale or Storm Signal No 8 is now issued, High Speed Rail train service remains normal. If the weather conditions deteriorate, or a higher Tropical Cyclone Warning Signal is issued, train services may be suspended. The destination of High Speed Rail train G6048/G6047 on 06 and 07 Sep 2024 travelling between Hong Kong West Kowloon Station and Zhanjiangxi Station will change to Guangzhounan Station. Trains affected: G6048 (will arrive at Guangzhounan Station) G6047 (will depart from Guangzhounan Station) For the latest train schedules, please refer to the 12306 official website (12306. cn) or the mobile app. You may also check latest train information from the HSR website, mobile app or see the information provided at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2024-09-05T18:40:00.CONTENT_CN: 八號烈風或暴風信號現正生效，高速鐵路列車服務現維持正常。 若天氣情況惡化或天文台發出較高熱帶氣旋警告信號，高速鐵路列車服務或會暫停。 2024年09月06日及07日原定來往香港西九龍站及湛江西站的高速鐵路列車車次G6048/G6047，更改為來往廣州南站至香港西九龍站。 受影響車次: G6048 (終到站更改為廣州南站) G6047 (始發站更改為廣州南站) 有關車次的資料，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)，如已安裝手機應用程式，可按「車站大屏」頁面。您亦可留意於高速鐵路網頁、手機應用程式或香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊。

2024-09-05T19:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Stonecutters Bridge: Due to strong wind, the following temporary traffic arrangements are implemented on Stonecutters Bridge: The middle lanes of Stonecutters Bridge are closed. Only fast and slow lanes are opened to traffic. Speed limit is reduced to 50km/h. Members of the public are advised to watch out for the latest traffic news through radio and television broadcasts, and for the traffic signs on site.
2024-09-05T19:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 昂船洲大橋： 由於強風關係，昂船洲大橋已實施下列臨時交通措施： 昂船洲大橋的中線封閉，只餘快線及慢線開放予車輛行駛，車速限制降至每小時50公里。 市民請留意電台/電視廣播的最新交通消息，以及現場的交通標誌。
